If this attack reduces a creature to 0 hit points, they become stable and are petrified into a withered stone tree featuring their tortured likeness. The petrification lasts until the creature is restored by a cure ailment power of 4th order or higher, a greater restoration spell, or a similar supernatural effect.

Actions.Name: Missile Thorn
Actions.Content: Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit, range 90 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d6) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage.

Actions.Name: Tree Teleport (3/Day; 5th-Level Spell)
Actions.Content: Anthracia touches a living tree. She instantly teleports to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of another living tree within 500 feet of the first. Both trees must be Medium or larger.

Actions.Name: Wall of Poison (1/Day)
Actions.Content: Anthracia conjures an opaque wall of poisonous gas centered on a point she can see within 150 feet of her. The wall can be up to 50 feet long, 15 feet high, and 5 feet thick. The wall lingers in the air for 1 minute and its area is heavily obscured. Each creature who is in that area when the wall appears or who enters it for the first time on a turn must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking 26 (4d12) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Creatures who don’t need to breathe automatically succeed on this saving throw. A moderate wind (at least 10 miles per hour) disperses the wall after 4 rounds. A strong wind (at least 20 miles per hour) disperses it after 1 round.

Reactions.Name: Sudden Quake
Reactions.Content: When an enemy moves within 15 feet of Anthracia, she creates a small tremor in the ground beneath her. Each creature within 15 feet of her must succeed on a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone.

Traits.Name: Minion
Traits.Content: If the spark takes damage from an attack or as the result of a failed saving throw, their hit points are reduced to 0. If the spark takes damage from another effect, they die if the damage equals or exceeds their hit point maximum; otherwise they take no damage.

Traits.Name: Trampling Rampage
Traits.Content: If an enemy who is touching the ground starts their turn within 5 feet of two or more earth sparks, the enemy must make a Strength saving throw with a DC equal to 12 plus the number of earth sparks within 5 feet of the enemy. On a failed save, the enemy falls prone, and they can’t stand up until there are fewer than two earth sparks within 5 feet of them.

Actions.Name: Shatter Smash (Group Attack)
Actions.Content: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 bludgeoning damage.

Actions.Name: Snort Rocks (Group Attack)
Actions.Content: Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, range 30/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 bludgeoning damage. If the target is a flying creature, they must succeed on a Strength saving throw or fall prone. The DC for this saving throw equals 12 plus the number of sparks who joined the attack.

Traits.Name: Fey Ancestry
Traits.Content: The drider has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put the drider to sleep.

Traits.Name: Innate Spellcasting
Traits.Content:
The Black spider's innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 13). The drider can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components: 
At will: dancing lights
1/day each: darkness, faerie fire

Traits.Name: Spider Climb
Traits.Content: The drider can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

Traits.Name: Sunlight Sensitivity
Traits.Content: While in sunlight, the drider has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

Traits.Name: Web Walker
Traits.Content: The drider ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.

Actions.Name: Multiattack
Actions.Content: The Black Spider makes two attacks, with her claws. She can replace one of those attacks with a bite attack.

Actions.Name: Bite
Actions.Content: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 2 (1d4) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) poison damage.

Actions.Name: Claw
Actions.Content: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) slashing damage.

Reactions.Name: Extra limbs
Reactions.Content: When a melee attack misses Nezznara she can use her reaction to make a melee attack with her extra limbs +6 to hit, 1d10+3 slashing damage

LegendaryActions.Name: Mindless Attack (1st round)
LegendaryActions.Content:
Nezznara choses a creature within 30 ft. and charges its direction, any creature in the way will be moved 5ft to the side and have to make a DC 13 DEX saving throw. On a failed save the creature falls prone.

This movement does NOT provoke attacks of opportunity.

LegendaryActions.Name: Spider Net (middle of fight)
LegendaryActions.Content: Nezznara creates a web net and throws it into a point within 30ft. Each creature in a 10ft radius centered on that point (4x4) must make a dexterity 13 DC saving throw. On a failed save the target becomes restrained.

LegendaryActions.Name: Time lock (end of fight)
LegendaryActions.Content: Nezznara shatters her time crystal sending the party members roughly 3 months into the future.

Traits.Name: Amphibious
Traits.Content: The needler can breathe air and water.

Traits.Name: Sniper
Traits.Content: If the needler misses with a ranged weapon attack while they are hidden, they remain hidden. Additionally, if the needler makes a ranged weapon attack with advantage and hits, the attack deals an extra 3 (1d6) damage.

Traits.Name: Toxiferous
Traits.Content: When a creature hits the needler with a melee attack while within 5 feet of them or touches the needler, that creature takes 2 (1d4) poison damage.

Actions.Name: Poison Shortsword
Actions.Content: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage.

Actions.Name: Blowgun
Actions.Content: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 25/100 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute (save ends at end of turn). While poisoned in this way, the target takes 14 (4d6) poison damage at the start of each of their turns.

BonusActions.Name: Hop and Hide
BonusActions.Content: The needler jumps a number of feet up to their walking speed, then takes the Hide action.

Traits.Name: Relentless Hunger
Traits.Content: When the troll is reduced to 0 hit points by any damage other than acid or fire damage, they don’t die or fall unconscious and can continue moving and taking actions as usual. The troll only dies if they end their turn with 0 hit points, if acid or fire damage reduces them to 0 hit points, or if they take acid or fire damage while they have 0 hit points.

Traits.Name: Sluggish
Traits.Content: For 1 hour after sleep or another period of unconsciousness, the troll’s speed is halved and they can’t use Multiattack.

Actions.Name: Multiattack
Actions.Content: The troll makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

Actions.Name: Bite
Actions.Content: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) piercing damage. If the target is not a Construct, an Elemental, or a Plant, the troll regains hit points equal to the damage dealt. If this attack reduces the target to 0 hit points, the troll regains twice as many hit points as they otherwise would with this attack.

Actions.Name: Claw
Actions.Content: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) slashing damage.

Actions.Name: Crash Through
Actions.Content: The troll moves up to their speed in a straight line, smashing through mundane obstacles in their path. The troll can enter the spaces of Large or smaller creatures during this movement, forcing those creatures to make a DC 15 Strength saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 14 (4d6) bludgeoning damage and falls prone. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage and doesn’t fall prone. During this move, mundane objects that aren’t worn or carried by a creature take 14 (4d6) damage when the troll enters their space. If the troll moves into the space of a Large or larger object and this damage doesn’t destroy it, the troll’s movement stops and they are stunned until the end of their next turn.

Reactions.Name: Spiteful Retort
Reactions.Content: When the troll is reduced to 0 hit points and doesn’t die, they can make a Bite attack against a creature within 5 feet of them.

Creatures.zxz6bfgk.Name: Lightthief
Languages: understands Abyssal, Common, and Infernal but can’t speak

Actions.Name: Necrotic Drain
Actions.Content: Melee Spell Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) necrotic damage, or 13 (3d6 + 3) necrotic damage if the target can’t see the lightthief.

Actions.Name: Into the Light (Recharge 6)
Actions.Content: The lightthief teleports inside a light source they can see within 15 feet of them that is emitting bright or dim light. While inside the light source, the lightthief has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the light source. If the light source is extinguished by any means other than the lightthief’s Steal Light action, the lightthief is forced out, appears in an unoccupied space of their choice within 5 feet of the light source, and is paralyzed until the end of their next turn.

Actions.Name: Steal Light (Inside Light Source Only)
Actions.Content: The lightthief can cause the light they are inside to erupt in a burst of brilliant radiance. Each creature within 15 feet of the light source must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 14 (4d6) radiant damage and loses any darkvision they have for 1 minute. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage and doesn’t lose their darkvision. After this, the light source extinguishes and the lightthief appears in an unoccupied space of their choice within 5 feet of the light source.

Traits.Name: Bugbear’s Inspiration
Traits.Content: Allied Humanoids within 15 feet of the predator who can see or hear them have advantage on Wisdom and Charisma saving throws.

Traits.Name: Dirty Fighting
Traits.Content: When the predator hits a creature with a melee weapon attack and has advantage on the attack roll, the target must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the end of their next turn.

Actions.Name: Multiattack
Actions.Content: The predator makes two Curved Dagger or two Longbow attacks. If both attacks hit the same target, the predator has advantage on their next attack roll made against the target before the end of the predator’s next turn.

Actions.Name: Curved Dagger
Actions.Content: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) piercing damage.

Actions.Name: Longbow
Actions.Content: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage.

Actions.Name: Go for the Eyes (1/Day)
Actions.Content: Each ally within 30 feet of the predator who can hear and understand them gains the predator’s Dirty Fighting trait until the start of the predator’s next turn.

BonusActions.Name: Guerilla Training
BonusActions.Content: The predator takes the Dash or Hide action.
